title: Chanakya Chanakya Song Lyrics Dum
stanzas:
Chanakkya Chanakkya
yedho thandhiram seithaai
un madhiyaal en manadhai
neethan vasiyam seithaai

adam pidithen nee enthan
nenjil idam pidithaai
I love you da

Kadhalukkaaga unthan
nenjai kadan koduthai
I love you da

theeraadha un anbinaal
poraadi enai vendrathaal
en azhagellaam
unakkaaga samarpikkiraen

Chanakkya Chanakkya
yedho thandhiram seithaai
un madhiyaal en manadhai
neethan vasiyam seithaai

Unnai naanum ninaipathai
yaarum thadukindra velai
thudikkum idhayam
velai nirutham seikindradhe
uyir valikkindrathe

nee thandha otrai kaditham
aayiram murai naan padippene
unakkaaga aayiram kaditham
otrai nodiyil ezhudhiduvene

dhinam kaalaiyil
enthan aal kaattiyil
un pinban naan kandu
kan vizhikindren

Chanakkya Chanakkya
yedho thandhiram seithaai
un madhiyaal en manadhai
neethan vasiyam seithaai

Jannalin  valiye
vennila oliye
kasikindra neram
kattilin melae
kavidhaigal pole
naam vazhalaam
ini naam vazhalaam

idhu polave pala
aasaigale ul nenjil
oayaamal urundoduthe

Chanakkya Chanakkya
yedho thandhiram seithaai
un madhiyaal en manadhai
neethan vasiyam seithaai

adam pidithen nee enthan
nenjil idam pidithaai
I love you da

Kadhalukkaaga unthan
nenjai kadan koduthai
I love you da

theeraadha un anbinaal
poraadi enai vendrathaal
en azhagellaam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and attraction, highlighting the feelings of devotion and affection between lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In the movie Dum, this song showcases a romantic moment that emphasizes the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Sadhana Sargam and composed by Deva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on April 12, 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chanakya Chanakya, the vibrant energy of love is beautifully captured through Sadhana Sargam's captivating vocals. The song plays a pivotal role in the movie Dum, where it highlights the romantic connection between the characters. With its upbeat tempo and playful lyrics, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration. This track is perfect for any festive occasion, making it a favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chanakya Chanakya from the movie Dum is a vibrant celebration of love, brought to life by the enchanting voice of Sadhana Sargam. With Deva's catchy composition, this song perfectly captures the energetic vibe of romance and dance. Get ready to groove to this delightful track that will make your heart skip a beat!
stanzaMeanings: Chanakya, you have done some magic, with your charm you have captured my heart.
I have caught you, you have found a place in my heart, I love you.
For love, you have sacrificed your heart, I love you.
Because of your endless love, I dedicate all my beauty to you.
Chanakya, you have done some magic, with your charm you have captured my heart.
Thinking of you makes my heart work hard, it is alive because of you.
The message you gave me, I have learned it a thousand times for you, I will write a thousand messages in a moment.
In the morning, when I see my reflection, I find you behind me.
Chanakya, you have done some magic, with your charm you have captured my heart.
In the path of life, like the moonlight, we can live like poems, we can live like poems.
I will enjoy you while sleeping with my foot on you.
I will tell your story, I will mix it with my thoughts and laugh.
This is how many desires roll in my heart without stopping.
Chanakya, you have done some magic, with your charm you have captured my heart.
I have caught you, you have found a place in my heart, I love you.
For love, you have sacrificed your heart, I love you.
Because of your endless love, I dedicate all my beauty to you.
